source_pr.title: correct "order by", "having", "group by"s' resolving rules.
source_pr.body:
support order by item retrieve from "FROM CLAUSE". 
e.g. select id as c1 from src order by c1 + src.name.

symptoms: r = tk.MustQuery("select id as c1, name from select_order_test order by 2, id limit 1 offset 0;") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: r = tk.MustQuery("select id as c1, name from select_order_test order by 2, id limit 1 offset 0;") (executor/executor_test.go)

The current evidence does not include a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization change, so we conservatively mark it as insufficient_evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
